text: I feel a sense of curiosity standing in this quiet, dimly-lit corridor. The glow from the room behind the glass hints at creativity—an energy simmering in the stillness. The presence of empty chairs and technological displays suggests a place meant for thought and innovation, yet now it feels abandoned, suspended in a moment between activity and silence. I feel contemplative, as if I am on the threshold of discovery or reflection about human ambition and the spaces it requires.
